_comment: Fleet config for zed-multicam-recorder. Copy to config.json and edit for your setup.

_explanations.port: TCP port that each recorder listens on. Must match zed_recorder.py --port.
_explanations.remote_dir: Path on each Jetson where SVOs and sidecar CSVs land. Must be writable by the SSH user. /tmp is fine for tests but cleared on reboot — use /home/<user>/recordings or an SSD mount for production.
_explanations.default_resolution: ZED2 supports HD2K (15 fps max), HD1080 (30 fps), HD720 (60 fps), VGA (100 fps).
_explanations.default_fps: Capped by the resolution choice above.
_explanations.openblas_armv8: Set to true for Jetson Nano (Cortex-A57 cannot run modern numpy BLAS dispatch). Set to false on Xavier NX or Orin where it is not needed.
_explanations.default_ssh_user: Used when --hosts overrides config, or when a host entry omits 'user'.
_explanations.hosts.user: Per-Jetson SSH login. Often differs across machines if they were flashed by different people.
_explanations.hosts.label: Friendly identifier used in output tables and pull subdirectory names. Must be unique across hosts.
